name: baselight
description: Query thousands of public Baselight datasets (crypto, finance, climate, and more) with DuckDB SQL. Bundles the skill and the remote MCP server.

baselight.//: Resolves the API key like the skill (BASELIGHT_API_KEY env var, else ~/.baselight/credentials) as the x-api-key header.
baselight.headersHelper: k="$BASELIGHT_API_KEY"; if [ -z "$k" ] && [ -f "$HOME/.baselight/credentials" ]; then k=$(grep -m1 '^BASELIGHT_API_KEY=' "$HOME/.baselight/credentials" | cut -d= -f2- | tr -d '[:space:]'); fi; printf '{"x-api-key":"%s"}' "$k"
